creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
I believe the ipv6 category is for software that is intended for IPv6
 support, not just for any software that supports ipv6 in some way. In
 the first case we should probably add almost all ports into the ipv6
 category.
 
 -- Stanislav Sedov
 http://people.freebsd.org/~stas/stas.key.asc
